comment.body:
@topherbuckley 
> Rather than just wrapping the `onSerialReady` contents inside a `lifecycleScope.launch` call? i.e.

### This will not work as expected ❌
- We would need to apply this change across all 9 apps
- `onSerialReady` in `AbcvlibActivity` is already overridden and is invoked from `MainActivity`.

For example, in `BasicQrreceiver`:

```kotlin
override fun onSerialReady(usbSerial: UsbSerial) {
    publisherManager = PublisherManager()

    val qrCodeData = QRCodeData.Builder(this, publisherManager, this).build()
    qrCodeData.addSubscriber(this)

    publisherManager.initializePublishers()
    publisherManager.startPublishers()

    setSerialCommManager(SerialCommManager(usbSerial))
    super.onSerialReady(usbSerial)
}
```
-  All of the `MainActivity.onSerialReady` logic would remain at the main thread.
- Only `super.onSerialReady(usbSerial)` content and `onOutputsReady` will be shifted
- The apps will still unresponsive
